{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Benson's blue-lit basement
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson's blue-lit basement]] is a location from which [[Indirial]] can summon [[liquid steel]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson]]'s basement contains a steel skeleton with burning blue eyes.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
